hero.headline: Scoop Your Way Through Chennai's Coolest Flavors
hero.subheadline: Crafting happiness one delicious scoop at a time in Pammal's most loved dessert spot. Fresh, vibrant ice cream that captures the spirit of our neighborhood.

about.title: Sweet Stories from Pammal's Favorite Parlor
about.story: Born right here on 58 Pammal Main Road, ibaco started as a small dream to bring extraordinary ice cream to our community. We've been churning smiles and creating memories for local families since day one, using locally sourced ingredients and recipes that celebrate Chennai's vibrant food culture.

highlights.title: Locally Crafted
highlights.description: Every scoop is made fresh in our Pammal kitchen

highlights.title: Flavor Innovation
highlights.description: Unique combinations that surprise and delight

services.title: Scoops of Joy, Served Just For You

items.title: Classic Flavors
items.description: Timeless favorites that remind you of childhood summers in Chennai

items.title: Fusion Creations
items.description: Innovative flavor combinations inspired by local Tamil cuisine

items.title: Sundae Specials
items.description: Elaborate dessert experiences topped with our signature sauces

items.title: Custom Cakes
items.description: Personalized ice cream cakes for every celebration

items.name: Priya Rajesh
items.text: The most amazing ice cream in Pammal! Always fresh and incredibly delicious.

items.name: Rahul Kumar
items.text: ibaco's fusion flavors are a game-changer. Their local ingredients make all the difference.

items.name: Meera Shankar
items.text: My kids absolutely love their weekend ice cream treats. Always clean, friendly, and delicious!

items.question: Do you offer dairy-free options?
items.answer: Yes! We have multiple non-dairy and vegan flavor selections.

items.question: Can I order for large groups?
items.answer: Absolutely! We specialize in party orders and catering for events.

items.question: Are your ingredients locally sourced?
items.answer: We pride ourselves on using fresh, local Tamil Nadu ingredients.

items.question: What are your most popular flavors?
items.answer: Our Filter Coffee and Mango Mastani are absolute neighborhood favorites!

items.question: Do you offer delivery?
items.answer: Yes, we deliver within Pammal and surrounding Chennai neighborhoods.

items.question: Are there options for kids?
items.answer: We have a special kids menu with smaller portions and fun flavors.

contact.title: Let's Get Deliciously Connected
contact.subtitle: Drop by or ring us up for your next sweet adventure!
